allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const {Pool} = require\(''pg''\); const pool = new Pool\({host:process.env.DB_HOST,port:process.env.DB_PORT,user:process.env.DB_USER,password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD,database:process.env.DB_NAME}\); pool.query\(\\`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS complaint_intake_sessions \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), session_token UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), citizen_user_id UUID REFERENCES users\(id\) ON DELETE SET NULL, current_language VARCHAR\(10\) DEFAULT ''en'', chat_history JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT ''[]'', structured_draft JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT ''{}'', status VARCHAR\(20\) DEFAULT ''ACTIVE'', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\)\)\\`\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\(''Table created OK''\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(''Error:'',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>pool.end\(\)\)")
